name: eco-tracker
description: EcoTracker weather and sustainability dashboard desktop application

scripts.test-db: node -e "require('mongoose').connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/ecotracker').then(() => { console.log('Successfully connected to MongoDB!'); process.exit(0); }).catch(err => { console.error('Connection failed:', err.message); process.exit(1); })"
